Thank you for the quick reply and great support!

turns.text: i have a usta match that was played over 8 days ago and isn't on my utr results

I can help with that! Since the match was played more than 8 days ago, there's been plenty of time for the USTA sync to run, so let's get this looked into.

To track down the missing result, I'll need a few details:

- **Your UTR profile link** (e.g., https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/XXXXXX)
- **Opponent's name** and profile link (if you have it)
- **Match date** and the **correct score** (set by set)
- **Event name** and a **link to the match result on the USTA website** (if available)

Go ahead and share whatever you have!

https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/4575422
Matthew Nguyen
5/24/26
6-2,6-4
USTA
https://tennislink.usta.com/Leagues/Main/StatsAndStandings.aspx?t=R-17&search=1011959754

Thanks for those details! I just need a couple more things to get a ticket submitted for you:

- **Your full name**
- **Your email address**
anthony yoo [email]

Got it! Here's a summary of what I'll submit:

- **Name:** Anthony Yoo
- **Email:** [email]
- **Profile:** https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/4575422
- **Opponent:** Matthew Nguyen
- **Match date:** May 24, 2026
- **Score:** 6-2, 6-4
- **Source:** USTA Leagues
- **Score URL:** https://tennislink.usta.com/Leagues/Main/StatsAndStandings.aspx?t=R-17&search=1011959754

Let me submit this to our support team now!

Your support ticket has been submitted — your ticket number is **#842240**. Our team will investigate the missing USTA Leagues match and get it added to your UTR profile.

Is there anything else I can help you with?
i have an unauthorized charge on my credit card

sorry hear that — an unauthorized charge is definitely something we want to look into right away.

To help the support team investigate, could you share a few details?

What is the charge amount, and approximately when did it appear on your statement?
it is for $120, and posted on June 20, 2026

Got it — a $120 charge posted on June 20, 2026 that you don't recognize.

Could you tell me what platform you use UTR Sports on — web, iOS, or Android?
iOS
Thanks! Could you share the exact error or description shown on your statement for this charge (e.g., "UTR Sports", "Apple", etc.)?
it says Universal tennis llc DBA UTR sports, UTR power Miami Beach FL

Understood. It looks like the charge came directly [location] (not through Apple).

To get this escalated to our support team, could I get your full name and the email address associated with your UTR account?
Scott Lindsey [email]
Thanks, Scott! Let me get that ticket submitted for you.

Your support ticket has been submitted — your ticket number is #847735. Our team typically replies within four business days, working through requests in the order they're received. Thanks for your patience!

Is there anything else I can help you with?
how do I get paid I won prize money through a utr tournament
I'll help you with that. Let me pull up the details on prize money payouts.

The Knowledge Base doesn't have specific details on prize money payout procedures. To help you get this sorted, I need a bit more information:

**Which type of tournament did you win prize money in?** Was it a UTR Pro Tennis Tour (PTT) event, a Flex League, a standard UTR event, or something else?
hotel planner tour shootout

I don't have specific information about Hotel Planner Tour Shootout prize payouts in our system. Prize money distribution is typically handled directly by the event organizer or host.

**To get your prize money, I'd recommend:**

1. **Check the event page** — look for a "Prize Money" or "Payouts" section on the Hotel Planner Tour Shootout event listing on UTR Sports.
2. **Contact the event organizer directly** — they'll have the payout schedule and process. You can find their contact info on the event page itself.
3. **Check your email** — the organizer may have already sent payout instructions after the tournament ended.

If you've already won and haven't received payment instructions, reach out to the event host. They manage all prize distributions.

Is there anything else I can help with regarding your UTR account or events?
